name: sevDesk
description: Sync InvoiceLeaf invoices to sevDesk on a schedule with contact resolution and idempotent mappings.

apiKey.instructions: Generate an API token in sevDesk and paste it here. The token is sent as the raw Authorization header value.

triggers.name: Scheduled Invoice Sync
triggers.description: Synchronize recent InvoiceLeaf invoices to sevDesk

triggers.name: On Invoice Created
triggers.description: Sync newly created InvoiceLeaf invoices to sevDesk

triggers.name: On Invoice Updated
triggers.description: Sync updated InvoiceLeaf invoices to sevDesk

triggers.name: On Invoice Deleted
triggers.description: Cancel mapped sevDesk invoices when InvoiceLeaf invoices are deleted

triggers.name: Scheduled sevDesk Import
triggers.description: Import new or changed sevDesk invoices into InvoiceLeaf

actions.name: Test sevDesk Connection
actions.description: Verify API-key access and discover default sync IDs in sevDesk

apiKey.title: sevDesk API Key
apiKey.description: Optional fallback for environments where external API-key connection is not available in UI.

contactPersonId.title: Contact Person ID
contactPersonId.description: Optional override. If unset, the integration tries to discover from existing sevDesk invoices.

addressCountryId.title: Address Country ID
addressCountryId.description: Optional override. If unset, the integration tries to discover from existing sevDesk invoices.

unityId.title: Default Unity ID
unityId.description: Unity reference for invoice positions (e.g., piece).

targetStatus.title: Invoice Status in sevDesk
targetStatus.description: 100 = Draft, 200 = Open (uses sendBy transition after create)

sendTypeForOpenStatus.title: Send Type for Open Status
sendTypeForOpenStatus.description: Applied when targetStatus is 200 to move draft invoices to open/sent.

initialSyncLookbackHours.title: Initial Sync Lookback (hours)
initialSyncLookbackHours.description: Used only until first successful run checkpoint is stored.

invoiceNumberPrefix.title: Invoice Number Prefix
invoiceNumberPrefix.description: Optional prefix added to InvoiceLeaf invoice numbers before sending to sevDesk.

enableInboundSync.title: Enable Inbound sevDesk Sync
enableInboundSync.description: When enabled, sevDesk invoices are imported into InvoiceLeaf by the scheduled inbound trigger.

inboundInitialSyncLookbackHours.title: Inbound Initial Lookback (hours)
inboundInitialSyncLookbackHours.description: Used only until the first successful inbound sync checkpoint is stored.

configGroups.title: sevDesk Connection
configGroups.description: API endpoint and defaults discovered from your account

configGroups.title: Invoice Defaults
configGroups.description: Tax and invoice defaults for newly synced documents

configGroups.title: Mapping Defaults
configGroups.description: Invoice number and contact naming behavior
